content: The error-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms that differentiate ICM and RND curiosity-driven reinforcement learning can be repurposed to dynamically prune and prioritize stored episodic memories in 2024–2025 SOTA active learning agent memory systems, where only memory traces that generate persistent prediction error are retained for future active querying. This creates a self-sustaining cycle where curiosity about unmodeled memory inputs drives both active data acquisition and memory storage optimization at the same time.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
